geographic_restrictions: U.S. (no specific geographic restriction beyond U.S. eligibility)
project_area: sheep and land stewardship management plans, emissions mitigation, productivity improvements
demographic_requirements: U.S. sheep or lamb producer with farm records with USDA Farm Service Agency
eligibility_summary: Applicants must be U.S. sheep or lamb producers with farm records with USDA Farm Service Agency, complete required paperwork (AD-2047), certify not being a foreign entity or double-funded, agree to share farm data, and participate in workshops/webinars.
